title: Join Me At Info-Tech LIVE This June in Las Vegas
summary: Alex Kantrowitz is speaking at Info-Tech LIVE in Las Vegas (June 9-11, 2026) on career pivots and paths to leadership. The event features sessions on translating AI investment into business value and building AI strategy, targeting CIOs and senior IT leaders interested in practical AI implementation beyond hype.
